<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaalslang (astrologie)]][[cdo:Sĭng-sê̤ṳ]][[de:Metall-Schlange]][[fr:Serpent de métal]][[hak:Sîn-sṳ]][[ja:辛巳]][[ko:신사 (간지)]][[nds:Metall-Snaak]][[vi:Tân Tỵ]][[za:Sinceih]][[zh-min-nan:Sin-sū]][[zh-yue:辛巳]][[zh:辛巳]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaalslang (astrologie)]][[cdo:Sĭng-sê̤ṳ]][[de:Metall-Schlange]][[fr:Serpent de métal]][[hak:Sîn-sṳ]][[ja:辛巳]][[ko:신사 (간지)]][[nds:Metall-Snaak]][[vi:Tân Tỵ]][[za:Sinceih]][[zh-min-nan:Sin-sū]][[zh-yue:辛巳]][[zh:辛巳]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Snake|kanji=辛巳|romaji=kanoto mi|onyomi=shinshi|p=xīnsì|w=hsin-ssu|mi=ɕin⁵³ sɨ|y=san1 si6|j=san1 si6|ci=sɐn siː|mc=sin si|oc-bs=sin slɯʔ|qq=}}
{{Referencesの明記| date = 2021st year 6月|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Kanotomi''' (辛巳) (pronounced ka-no-to-mi, shin-kin-no-mi, or shin-shi) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle]]. 

It is the 18th of the combined sets of the Ten Heavenly Stems and Twelve Earthly Branches. The one before it is [[Yang Metal Dragon]], and the one after it is [[Yang Water Horse]]. According to the [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|Yin-yang and Five Elements]], the [[Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] element [[Kanoto (辛)]] is the yin aspect of metal, and the [[Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]] element [[Snake (zodiac)|Snake (巳)]] is the yin aspect of fire. Under the concept of [[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Mutual Restraint]], fire subdues metal (火剋金).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Metal Snake (辛巳)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnsì
** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 si6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-mi
***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-mi
***Onyomi 1: shinji
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinhsa (신사)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Tỵ

<!--
==
* Yin Metal Snake (辛巳) 
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnsì
** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 sei3
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi: かのとみ (kanoto-mi)
***Onyomi: しんかのみ (shinka-no-mi)
***Onyomi: しんび (shinbi)
** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinsa
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Tỵ

-->
==Years of Yin Metal Snake==
A Gregorian calendar year that, when divided by 60, has a remainder of 21 is a Kanotomi year.
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Kanotomi Years'''
|-
!1st Millennium!!2nd Millennium!!3rd Millennium
|-
|
*21
*81
*141
*201
*261
*321
*381
*441
*501
*561
*621
*681
*741
*801
*861
*921
*981
|
*1041
*1101
*1161
*1221
*1281
*1341
*1401
*1461
*1521
*1581
*1641
*1701
*1761
*1821
*1881
*1941
|
*2001
*2061
*2121
*2181
*2241
*2301
*2361
*2421
*2481
*2541
*2601
*2661
*2721
*2781
*2841
*2901
*2961
|}

==Months of Yin Metal Snake==
In the Gregorian calendar, during years ending in 0 or 5 (where the [[Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are [[Kanoe (庚)]] or [[Kinoto (乙)]]), the fourth month (April) is the Kanotomi month. Note that this can refer to the month in the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] or the “solar term” month (from [[Lixia]] to the day before [[Mangzhong|Bōshu]]).

==Days of Yin Metal Snake==
A Kanotomi day is associated with the following selection day (選日).

=== Auspicious Days ===
On a Kanotomi day, it is the fourth day of [[Tsuchi (Japanese term)|Shōdo]].
== See Also ==
*{{prefix|qq=}}
*{{intitle|qq=}}

[[zh-min-nan:Sin-chá]]
[[zh-yue:辛巳]]

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yin Metal Snake|qq=ja|辛巳|version=84123765|comment=Imported full ja history}}



[[cdo:Sin-cṳ̄de]]
[[nds:Metall-Schlangeni]]
[[de:Yin Metal Snake]]

[[ja:辛巳]]
[[zh:辛巳]]
[[ko:신사 (간지)]]
[[fr:Serpent de métal]]
[[de:Metall-Schlange]]
[[ko:%EC%8B%A0%EC%82%AC (%EA%B0%84%EC%A7%80)]]
[[fr:Serpent de m%C3%A9tal]]
[[zh:%E8%BE%9B%E5%B7%B3]]

[[af:Metaalslang (astrologie)]]
[[de:Metall-Schlangeni]]
[[en:Metal Snake]]
[[fr:Serpent de métalboishak]]
[[it:Sin-chṳ́id]]

[[vi:Tân Tỵ]]
[[za:Sincceij]]
[[ar:Yin Metal Snake]]

<!--Yin Metal Snake-->

<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[cdo:Sĭng-sê̤ṳ]]
[[hak:Sîn-sṳ]]
[[nds:Metall-Snaak]]
[[za:Sinceih]]
[[zh-min-nan:Sin-sū]]
[[zh-yue:辛巳]]
<!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[cdo:Sĭng-sê̤ṳ]]
[[hak:Sîn-sṳ]]
[[nds:Metall-Snaak]]
[[za:Sinceih]]
[[zh-min-nan:Sin-sū]]
[[zh-yue:辛巳]]
{{wikidata link|Q1062057}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
